response: To cut out sugar from your daily diet, start by reading food labels and avoiding products with [added sugars]. Replace sugary snacks with fruits or nuts. Use [natural sweeteners] like stevia or monk fruit instead of refined sugar. Drink water or unsweetened beverages. Check hidden sugars in sauces and dressings. Limit processed foods. Gradually reduce sugar intake to avoid cravings. Be mindful of sugar in coffee and tea.
